title: Cookie Manager

statement.markdown:
### Problem Statement
Create a Cookie Manager application that allows users to store, edit, and delete cookies.

 ### Requirements
1. Display a form to input cookie name and value.
2. Store the input cookie in local storage.
3. Display all stored cookies in a table.
4. Provide options to edit and delete each cookie.
5. Implement validation for cookie name and value.

constraints: Use HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for this challenge.
Validate cookie name and value before storing.
Use a table to display all stored cookies.

gradingCriteria.description: Cookies are stored in local storage.
Users can input cookie name and value.
Cookies are displayed in a table.
Users can edit and delete each cookie.
Cookie name and value are validated.
